'''Nuuta''', a [[Phindian/Legends|Phindian]], was the father of [[Kaadi]]. One of the [[Memory wipe/Legends|renewed]], he had been sent to [[Alba-16|Alba]]. He was most likely alive as of [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], when Kaadi and the Derida brothers, [[Guerra Derida|Guerra]] and [[Paxxi Derida|Paxxi]], overthrew the [[Syndicat]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past]]'' {{1stm}}
